TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Xiulin mki sku Hualien. su'unun kwara glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 1,623.87 km¬≤ (rhyan rinpang glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 1,489.3 km¬≤, rr'an hyan glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 88.31 km¬≤), 14,830 hi ku su'unun kwara alang hi kya, 4,504 buwan ku kwarakya, tiku sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga 13,244 hi, kyala kwara pinspung s'uli ga 89%. kwara sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga Taywang Gyencumin na Truku ku smrrhu ku pyux s'uli taya kya. ays ptyaw sebu Xiulin ays psgayun 9 ru 18 alang. 18 alang hani ga, Knlibu , Gukut , Tkijig , Bsngan , Pratan , Kdusan , Kulu , Tpuqu , Dowras , Bsuring , Kulu , Dowmung , Ibuh , Tmunan , Myawan , Branaw , Qowgan , Qnragan .
S.PHON: xiulin mki s~…ēku ńßualien. s~…ēu Ēunun kwara …£laő≤aŇč liŇčaj Ēkijan …£a *,***.** km* (rńßjan rinpaŇč …£laő≤aŇč liŇčaj Ēkijan …£a *,***.* km*, rr Ēan ńßjan …£laő≤aŇč liŇčaj Ēkijan …£a **.** km*), **,*** ńßi ku s~…ēu Ēunun kwara alaŇč ńßi kja, *,*** ő≤uwan ku kwarakja, tiku s~…ēańßuj na alaŇč …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **,*** ńßi, kjala kwara pins~…ēpuŇč s~…ē Ēuli …£a **%. kwara s~…ēańßuj na alaŇč …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a tajwaŇč …£jen ¶~ ®umin na truku ku s~…ēmrrńßu ku pjux s~…ē Ēuli taja kja. ajs~…ē ptjaw s~…ēeő≤u xiulin ajs~…ē ps~…ē…£ajun * ru ** alaŇč. ** alaŇč ńßani …£a, knliő≤u , …£ukut , tkiji…£ , ő≤s~…ēŇčan , pratan , k*us~…ēan , kulu , tpuqu , *owras~…ē , ő≤s~…ēuriŇč , kulu , *owmuŇč , iő≤uńß , tmunan , mjawan , ő≤ranaw , qow…£an , qnra…£an .
